title: Section 3
content: The Acts mentioned in the first schedule hereto annexed are now in force 1[in the whole of India except 2[the territories which, immediately before the 1st November, 1956, were comprised in Part B States] and] the Scheduled Districts.
footnote: 1. Subs. by the A.O. 1950 for "throughout all the Provinces of India, except". 2. Subs. by the Adaptation of Laws (No. 2) Order, 1956, for "Part B States" (w.e.f. 1-11-1956).
